name: Black Magic Cake (for Food Processor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 9 x 13" pan and set aside.
3. Using the metal blade, mix the first six ingredients in the food processor until combined, about 5 seconds.
4. In a liquid measuring cup, stir together the remaining frosting ingredients.
5. With the machine running, slowly pour the liquid mixture through the feed tube in a steady stream.
6. Let blend until smooth, about 5 seconds.
7. Scrape down the work bowl and mix for an additional 5 seconds.
8. Pour into prepared pan and bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
9. Frost with Dark Chocolate Frosting: Break chocolate into 1-inch chunks. Using the metal blade, chop fine. Bring water and butter just to boil; remove from heat; add vanilla. With the machine running, pour liquid in a slow stream through the tube. Scrape; add sugar. Blend.
